类 Movement

java.lang.Object
com.zenith.feature.pathfinder.movement.Movement
所有已实现的接口:
IMovement
直接已知子类:
MovementAscend, MovementDescend, MovementDiagonal, MovementDownward, MovementFall, MovementParkour, MovementPillar, MovementTraverse
public abstract class Movement extends Object implements IMovement

      public MovementState updateState(MovementState state)
